# Taiye Promise K.

> AI automation developer, product builder, and founder of Kotique Studio. Based in Akure, Nigeria.

Taiye Promise K. is a developer and entrepreneur who builds AI-powered tools, automation systems, and digital products. He is the founder of Kotique Studio, an AI-powered film studio infrastructure project. He studies at FUTA (Federal University of Technology, Akure).

## What he does

- **AI Automation**: Voice agents, WhatsApp bots, n8n workflows. Helps businesses automate slow processes.
- **Product Building**: Building Ghost Shift (anonymous job marketplace), Broken Hero (browser roguelike), Echo Vault (voice-based personal archive SaaS), and IRONBOUND.
- **Kotique Studio**: Building AI-powered film studio infrastructure — not making films, building the machine that will.
- **Student**: Studying at the Federal University of Technology, Akure (FUTA). Tech, always.

## Currently building

- Ghost Shift — Anonymous job marketplace. In development.
- Broken Hero — Browser roguelike with deck-building. In development.
- Echo Vault — Voice-based personal archive SaaS. Planned.
- Kotique Studio — AI film studio infrastructure. Active.
- IRONBOUND — In development.
